# text / storage

The **text** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `text` field token to a Postgres `text` column via
`build(name) => text(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("text")`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Text field type: DB storage capability — maps to a Postgres text column.
- Server:
  - Contributes: `fields.storage` "text"
  - Uses: `fields/server-capabilities.Fields`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/server-capabilities-loader`
